emergencyReroute.message: Emergency corridor active — use Gate 7 and East concourse only.

congestionBroadcast.message: South concourse congestion rising — consider North entrance.

feed.title: Overcrowding Alert — Section B4
feed.body: Crowd density at 96%. Immediate rerouting recommended. Do not enter from Gate 4 South entrance at this time.

feed.title: Gate 12 — Emergency Closure
feed.body: Gate 12 has been closed by stadium security. Use Gates 9, 10, or 15 as alternatives. Staff is directing fans on the concourse.

feed.title: Parking Lot C — High Delay
feed.body: Exit delays at Lot C estimated at 22 minutes post-match. Consider Lot A via West Exit for 8 min shorter wait.

feed.title: Weather Alert — Light Rain Expected
feed.body: Light rain forecast between 21:00–22:00. Covered exits via Gates 8 and 9 are recommended. Ponchos available at Merchandise Stand 3.

feed.title: Section 102 Restrooms — Queue Building
feed.body: Queue at 102 restrooms is growing. Level 1 South is currently free with no wait expected.

feed.title: Halftime in 12 Minutes
feed.body: Head to the North Wing food stands now to avoid the halftime rush. Current wait: 2 minutes only.

feed.title: Fan Zone — Meet & Greet at 20:30
feed.body: Meet the players at the South Fan Zone after the game. Limited capacity — first come first served.

feed.title: Gate 8 Reopened — Flow Restored
feed.body: Gate 8 is now operational again. Flow has returned to normal. All routes via East Wing are clear.

fire.headerSub: Follow illuminated exit signs. Do not use lifts unless directed by staff.
fire.primaryRouteTitle: Primary route: West stairwell → Gate A

instructions.title: Stay calm
instructions.body: Panic causes congestion. Follow staff and green exit signs.

instructions.title: Leave belongings
instructions.body: Do not stop for bags. Your safety comes first.

instructions.title: Assist others
instructions.body: If safe, help children and mobility-impaired fans to the nearest clear exit.

liveSeeds.title: Central atrium — smoke reported
liveSeeds.body: Divert west only. Do not cross mid-field tunnels.

liveSeeds.title: Sprinklers active Zone 4
liveSeeds.body: Flooring may be slick — short steps, hand on rail.

medical.headerSub: Medical teams responding. Keep aisles and elevator banks clear.
medical.primaryRouteTitle: Evacuation hold: follow staff — Gate D medical cordon
medical.primaryRouteSub: Non-ambulatory fans: wait for blue-jacket medics

instructions.title: Clear the aisle
instructions.body: Step into your row so responders can pass.

instructions.title: SOS in app
instructions.body: Use CrowdPilot SOS to share your exact seat with staff.

liveSeeds.title: Elevator B reserved for stretcher
liveSeeds.body: Use stairs or alternate lift bank west.

liveSeeds.title: Hydration stations open
liveSeeds.body: North concourse taps active for standby fans.

crowd_surge.headerSub: Density limits active. Staff are metering gates — do not push.
crowd_surge.primaryRouteTitle: Rerouted: East service bypass → Gate B

instructions.title: No stopping
instructions.body: Keep moving in the queue — pauses cause crush risk.

instructions.title: Follow reroutes
instructions.body: Digital signs may differ from your ticket gate — obey staff.

instructions.title: Check app map
instructions.body: CrowdPilot updates every few seconds during surge events.

liveSeeds.title: Section 118 — density critical
liveSeeds.body: Do not enter 118 from north tunnel. Use east stairs only.

liveSeeds.title: Gate B queue moving
liveSeeds.body: Wait time down to ~6 minutes after metering wave.

weather.headerSub: Lightning in area. Covered routes recommended; outdoor plazas may be closed.
weather.primaryRouteSub: Extra staff on slick surfaces — take short steps

instructions.title: Avoid outdoor plazas
instructions.body: Use covered bridges and concourse rings only.

instructions.title: Watch footing
instructions.body: Rain + paint can be slick on stairs — use handrails.

instructions.title: Ponchos
instructions.body: Merch Stand 3 if you must cross exposed links.

liveSeeds.title: Lightning delay: 20 min window
liveSeeds.body: Concourse remains open; bowl exits to plaza paused.

liveSeeds.title: North bridge traction mats laid
liveSeeds.body: Extra lighting active — follow amber floor strips.
